title: Save corrected items (receipt.confirm)
description: Submit the corrected item list via receipt.confirm; reflect SAVED state.

title: Review screen: inline edit extracted items
description: List extracted items (name, price, quantity, category) with inline edits. Per-item confidence is deferred (model doesn't emit it yet); when added, surface low-confidence rows first per Pillar 2.

title: Kick off parse + poll for results
description: Call receipt.create with the uploaded image; poll receipt.get until status READY with a processing state. Handle ERROR.

title: Camera capture screen + upload to UploadThing
description: Capture/select a receipt photo (expo camera or image picker), upload to UploadThing, obtain url+key. Camera-first per Pillar 1.

title: Phase 1 — Capture → extract → review (broccoli-mobile)
description: App side of the core loop: capture a receipt photo, upload it, show extracted items while parsing, let the user correct them inline, and save. Talks to broccoli-api via tRPC. Done when: a real receipt becomes a saved, corrected item list on a device.

title: Produce a development build for a physical device
description: eas build --profile development for iOS/Android; install on device. Set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL to the deployed broccoli-api URL.
close_reason: EAS Android development build produced and installed on a physical device (build 3d145866). Includes expo-dev-client + expo-network native module.

title: Scaffold Expo app (expo-router) + API/auth client
description: create-expo-app, src/lib/api.ts (health), src/lib/auth-client.ts (better-auth expo + secure-store), home screen shows live broccoli-api status.

title: Set up EAS (login, eas init, project id)
description: Interactive: 'eas login' + 'eas init' to link an EAS project and write projectId into app.json. eas.json profiles already scaffolded.
close_reason: EAS project created and linked: @afrothundr/broccoli-mobile (id ab0e4d00-4e27-42b2-ac1f-aac132506845); projectId + owner written to app.json

title: Phase 0 — Foundations (broccoli-mobile)
description: Stand up the Expo app: scaffold, API client + better-auth wiring, EAS dev builds. Done when the app boots on a device, reaches broccoli-api /health, and can sign in.
close_reason: Phase 0 complete: Expo app scaffolded, EAS set up, Android dev build on device, sign-in against broccoli-api verified end to end.

title: Verify core loop on device end to end
description: On the Android dev build: snap a real receipt -> review -> correct -> save, and confirm items persisted via broccoli-api. Phase 1 'done when'.

title: DECISION: how to share AppRouter types mobile<->api for tRPC
description: Separate repos can't import types directly. Options: publish a @broccoli/api-types package (GitHub Packages), git submodule, or codegen. Needed before the typed tRPC client lands in Phase 1.
close_reason: Resolved: monorepo with pnpm workspaces. Mobile imports AppRouter type directly from broccoli-api/router — no package/submodule/codegen needed.

title: Verify boot + /health + auth on device
description: The Phase 0 'done when': app boots on device, home screen shows broccoli-api connected, and a user can sign in.
close_reason: Verified on device: app boots, home shows broccoli-api connected (/health), email/password sign-in against deployed broccoli-api succeeds, signed-in user shown.

title: Sign-in flow against broccoli-api
description: Minimal sign-up/sign-in screen using authClient; confirm session persists via secure-store across restarts.
close_reason: Built email/password sign-in flow: SignIn component (sign-in/sign-up toggle, error handling) calling authClient.signIn.email/signUp.email; root _layout gates on authClient.useSession() -> SignIn vs AppTabs; home screen shows signed-in email + sign-out. Typechecks and lint-clean. End-to-end runtime against the API is verified on-device in o8h.5 (needs the dev build).
